sglang.title: Update install docs
sglang.author: simveit
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Problem handling when encountering OSError: CUDA_HOME environment variable is not set. Please set it to your CUDA install root.

sglang.title: Add support for OpenAI API o1 model
sglang.author: ChuyueSun
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
OpenAI API o1 model does not support max_tokens. It uses max_completion_tokens instead.
Modifications

Add openai API support for o1.
Add an example script.

Checklist

 Format your code according to the Code Formatting with Pre-Commit.
 Add unit tests as outlined in the Running Unit Test

vllm.title: [V1][core] Implement pipeline parallel on Ray
vllm.author: ruisearch42
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR supports running separated model layers on different pipeline parallel workers. The scheduling and pipelining will be done in another PR.
Milestone 3 of #11945 . (This does not depend on the previous 2 milestones.)

vllm.title: [VLM] Remove input processor from clip and siglip
vllm.author: Isotr0py
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Since Llava series models have all migrated to use merged multimodal processor, it should be safe to remove input processor
helper from clip and siglip.

vllm.title: [Frontend] Pass pre-created socket to uvicorn
vllm.author: russellb
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
I noticed that the fd=... argument had been re-added to our uvicorn
configuration, but only for mac, in PR #11696.. A previous PR, #10012,
includes an explanation of why we should not be using this argument,
as it does not behave as intended.
There is another way to do what we really want, which is

vllm.title: [V1] Clarify input processing and multimodal feature caching logic
vllm.author: ywang96
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
As we open up V1 interface to community developers, IMO it's important to have a good level of documentation clarity in terms of code logic.
Since there has been good progress in #10114, this PR cleans up and adds clarifications on input processing and multimodal feature caching logic so that it's e

vllm.title: [VLM] Merged multi-modal processor for Molmo
vllm.author: DarkLight1337
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Adopt merged multi-modal processor for Molmo
Support different num_crops within the batch
Support Molmo-O (thanks @Isotr0py!)

Note: The model implementation can handle multi-image input now, but we need to refactor the prompt replacement logic to enable end-to-end support in vLLM as the image token

vllm.title: [V1][Core] Add worker_base for v1 worker
vllm.author: AoyuQC
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Creates new WorkerBase class with common configuration
Modifies GPU Worker to inherit from WorkerBase and keep GPU-specific implementations

vllm.title: [Misc] Qwen2.5-VL Optimization
vllm.author: wulipc
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Thanks to the VLLM team for their great work! This PR includes the following:
ꔷ Replaced Qwen2RMSNorm with vllm's official RMSNorm. Extensive testing has confirmed that this change does not introduce any numerical instability.
ꔷ Set _always_apply_prompt_replacements to True by default for Qwen-VL to

vllm.title: [VLM] Separate text-only and vision variants of the same model architecture
vllm.author: DarkLight1337
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Address #13012 (comment) by registering a separate architecture for text-only variant and vision variant. This lets us correctly detect whether the model supports multi-modal inputs.
Breaking change: After this PR, users will need to set --hf-overrides '{"architectures": [<arch>]}' explicitly to use

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Missing Content Type returns 500 Internal Server Error
vllm.author: vaibhavjainwiz
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Missing Content Type returns 500 Internal Server Error instead of 415 Unsupported Media Type
FIX #11171
Request :
curl -v http://0.0.0.0:8000/v1/chat/completions \                                                                                                        ✔  vllm Py  08:42:51 AM 
   -H

vllm.title: [Frontend] Add `/v1/audio/transcriptions` OpenAI API endpoint
vllm.author: NickLucche
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Follow up on the great work by @robertgshaw2-redhat  and @varun-sundar-rabindranath  here #12458.
This PR adds the /v1/audio/transcriptions OpenAI API endpoint.
Basic example (start server with vllm serve openai/whisper-large-v3):
from openai import OpenAI
from vllm.assets.audio import AudioAsset

m

vllm.title: Add label if pre-commit passes
vllm.author: hmellor
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Allows Buildkite to not run CI until pre-commit is passing, saving CI cost.
Originally discussed in https://vllm-dev.slack.com/archives/C07R5PAL2L9/p1736691851928849

vllm.author: mgoin
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Ported from sgl-project/sglang@cdae77b
Evaluation seems good
lm_eval --model vllm --model_args pretrained=/home/vllm-dev/DeepSeek-R1,tensor_parallel_size=8 --trust_remote_code --tasks gsm8k --num_fewshot 5 --batch_size auto
...
vllm (pretrained=/home/vllm-dev/DeepSeek-R1,tensor_parallel_size=8,trust

vllm.title: [Kernel][Bugfix] Refactor and Fix CUTLASS 2:4 Sparse Kernels
vllm.author: tlrmchlsmth
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR generally reworks the 2:4 sparse CUTLASS kernels, cleaning up the implementation, and fixes several issues.

cutlass_sparse_compress and cutlass_scaled_sparse_mm now share the dispatching for hyperparameter selection. This lets the compressor derive the sparse format from the GEMM kernel. No

vllm.title: Revert "Add label if pre-commit passes"
vllm.author: hmellor
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Reverts #12527

vllm.title: [ROCm] Avoid using the default stream on ROCm as it is a performance killer
vllm.author: gshtras
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Fixing a ROCm performance regression added by #11744
Using the default 0 stream on ROCm hurts the performance. With this PR there is an uplift on tp=8:
LLama-3-70B
latency goes from 1.85s to 1.7s
LLama-2-70b bs=1 in=2048 out=128 scheduler-steps=10
latency goes from 1.8s to 1.58s

vllm.title: [Kernel] Fix awq error when n is not divisable by 128
vllm.author: jinzhen-lin
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
The result of vllm awq kernel would be wrong when n is not divisable by 128 (but divisable by 64).
test data
import torch
import safetensors.torch
import vllm._custom_ops as vllm_ops
import awq_ext

k = 128
n = 64
group_size = 64
torch.cuda.manual_seed(0)
qweight = torch.randint(16, (k, n), dtype=to

vllm.title: [V1] Consolidate MM cache size to vllm.envs
vllm.author: ywang96
vllm.bodyExcerpt: We have a few places where the MM cache size is hardcoded and not configurable. This PR moves all of them to an env var so that it's guaranteed the two caches are mirrored.

vllm.title: [Bugfix/CI] Turn test_compressed_tensors_2of4_sparse back on
vllm.author: tlrmchlsmth
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Missed turning this one on in #13198

vllm.title: [Bugfix][CI] Inherit codespell settings from pyproject.toml in the pre-commit-config
vllm.author: tlrmchlsmth
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This is mainly to resolve an issue where the pre-commit hook does not look at ignore-words-list in pyproject.toml, which popped up during the development of #13198 (ElementE in this case).
This also removes the exclude regex from .pre-commit-config.yaml in favor of the skip list in pyproject.toml al

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Offline example of disaggregated prefill
vllm.author: XiaobingSuper
vllm.bodyExcerpt: The decode instance's prompts should be the same as the prefill instance's prompts, if not, the decode instance will have a hang issue.

vllm.title: [Misc] Remove redundant statements in scheduler.py
vllm.author: WrRan
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
simple fix:
is_prefill has been already set.

  
    
      vllm/vllm/core/scheduler.py
    
    
         Line 724
      in
      d84cef7
    
  
  
    

        
          
           is_prefill = seq_group.is_prefill()

vllm.title: Consolidate Llama model usage in tests
vllm.author: hmellor
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Use meta-llama/Llama-3.2-1B-Instruct for as many models as possible which used larger/older/base variations of Llama.
N.B.

LoRA tests could not have their models updated due to having adapters dependent on Llama 2
Tool use needed the 3B model
Spec decoding tests need a compatible draft and the curr

vllm.title: Expand MLA to support most types of quantization
vllm.author: mgoin
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
For MLA, aside from the FP8 case, we need to have access to the unquantized weights for the decode kernel.
This PR implements a general dequantization for quantization methods in vLLM by creating the identity matrix as input to layer.quant_method.apply() in order to get the transposed, unquantized w

vllm.title: [V1] LoRA - Enable Serving Usecase
vllm.author: varun-sundar-rabindranath
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Enable LoRA serving for V1 :-
Specifically, this PR plumbs the add_lora function from async_llm.py to lora_model_runner_mixin.py. The add_lora function is essential for the serving usecase.
Tested locally for correctness.
Note: The other LoRA specific serving functionality, like remove_lora, pin_lor

vllm.title: [ROCm][V1] Add intial ROCm support to V1
vllm.author: SageMoore
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This Pr is adds initial support for V1 on AMD systems. It uses the vllm/attention/ops/prefix_prefill.py kernel instead of flash-attn.
Current install instructions if you want to try it out. You should start with a new virtual environment. All of the below commands assume you are in the vllm source d

vllm.title: [Bugfix][V1] GPUModelRunner._update_states should return True when there is a finished request in batch
vllm.author: imkero
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Once a seq is finished, GPUModelRunner did not return True, leaving related tensor (including prompt_tokens_tensor) outdated. Finally get_token_bin_counts_and_mask was broken and this error was thrown.
This PR should fix this problem.
Close #13076
